global_short_circuit.action: Flag ALL projects as requiring reinstall and full re-review

install.description: Global installation of forge components to ~/.claude/

spans.action: copies agents, commands, rules, scripts, templates to ~/.claude/

hook_execution.description: Runtime hook pipeline on each Claude Code event
hook_execution.trigger: Claude Code event (Stop, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse)

spans.action: defines 8 hooks with matchers and commands
maps agent/skill to step number, updates forge-state.json
syncs project state before each prompt

phase_transition.description: Moving between phases via gate approval

project_bootstrap.description: Phase A: new project setup from empty directory

spans.action: 10 steps: detect stack, create CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, scaffold
read by Step S3, provides CLAUDE.md skeleton
read by Step S4, provides SPEC.md skeleton

planning.description: Phases 0-2: research, requirements, feasibility, architecture, and design

spans.action: break design into ordered GitHub issues

tdd_cycle.description: Phase 3: per-issue TDD loop with strict agent separation
tdd_cycle.trigger: Each GitHub issue in dependency order

spans.action: write tests from SPEC, must FAIL (N3)
write code to make tests PASS (N4)
inline code review of all changes

ship.description: Final release: audit, security, gate, and PR merge
